articles.title: Investors eye possible impact on next Fed rate cut as jobs, inflation data looms.
articles.summary: Investors brace for delayed January jobs and CPI data. With the Fed holding interest rates steady, these will signal if a 2026 rate cut is coming soon.

articles.title: Trump wants lower borrowing costs—but a Fed rate cut may be months away
articles.summary: Borrowing costs are likely to stay higher for longer, with only gradual relief expected through 2026.

articles.title: Federal Funds Rate History 1990 to 2026
articles.summary: The Federal Reserve has battled a variety of economic troubles over the past 35 years. Between tech busts, a financial crisis and a pandemic, not to mention periods of too little inflation and too much,

articles.title: Fed holds interest rates steady in first meeting of 2026
articles.summary: The Federal Open Market Committee kept the federal funds rate steady, following three rate cuts last year.

articles.title: Fed's Interest Rate Decision: December 10, 2025
articles.summary: The Federal Reserve concluded its last meeting of the year with a widely anticipated 25 basis point cut to the federal funds rate (FFR), bringing it to a range of 3.50-3.75%. Inflation has proven sticky over the past few years, never quite reaching that 2% ...
